title: seattle — seattle-skyline-from-water-2026-06-29
author: Ken Baker (InTheWake)
description: The Seattle skyline seen from Elliott Bay under an overcast July sky — Space Needle at left, downtown towers at centre-right, with a cruise ship at the downtown waterfront and the Seattle Great Wheel at right. Photographed by Ken Baker, 2026-06-29.
via: owner-provided (Ken Baker, photographed in person at Seattle, 2026-06-29)
